g.text: · took a wife of Huppim and Shuppim
these were the sons of Gilead,
the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh
the sons of Ephraim, in descent:
also his sons Ezer and Elead, killed by the
men of Gath when they came for the livestock;
Ephraim their father mourned many days
· his daughter — built the Beth Horons
and by the borders of Manasseh:

svg.text: verse 20 — The sons of Ephraim: Shuthelah, Bered his son, Tahath his son, Eleadah his son, Tahath his son,
names as spelled in the World English Bible
